title: Transformers-Fall of Cybertron(Autobots)
description: My second texture pack. A pack that's based on Transformers-Fall of Cybertron. Adds Autobots.
body:
A resourcepack based on Transformers Fall of Cybertron. Adds Autobots from the game. It's in beta as of now. A lot of features are not added. Currently, this pack adds optimus prime's helmet, pathblaster,starsaber and energon axe. They are not renamed yet but will be renamed in future. Still optimus prime isn't finished. We will make armors also.But later.I hope you will enjoy this pack. Use optimsu prime skins as of now for better experience. 


This pack requires the following mods if using fabric:
1.Continiuty
2.ETF(Entity texture features)
3.EMF(Entity model featues)


Credit goes to:Hobbeswyn and me(YesSnepieSpider0 most of the contents are taken from his pack Pathblaster. Original pack:
[Pathblaster Crossbow (Decepticon and custom color added)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/optimus-prime-s-pathblaster-reload-and-texture-animation-w-audio-effects/?__cf_chl_tk=R7X27ZWBLgLBReLsVAwuwA99PgXYygG7E0L42UX1GJo-1769775430-1.0.1.1-LqlAZZn3iSI6je0Dntd3n6g.pPOAhP4BGl1FnHeSJ1w)
